text.title: Roadmap Design Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Roadmap Design end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: anchor-outcomes
step.action: Translate outcomes into horizon-eligible roadmap entries.

step.name: place-horizons
step.action: Sort into Now / Next / Later with confidence labels.

step.name: review-cadence-setup
step.action: Pick quarterly review slot; assign owner.

step.name: publish-and-iterate
step.action: Publish to audience; capture feedback; revisit quarterly.
